data.name: She Plays Dirty
data.detailed_description:
It's good to be an obedient puppy: no need to think, worry, fret — just exist

Visual novel where the main character can't decide where to go or what to do; he can only show his emotions. In this game, you'll have to decide which emotions the hero will experience: will he be happy, upset, or prefer to remain neutral.

  • One girl who will control every action

  • Three emotions to switch between at key moments

  • State system — try not to go crazy too soon

  • Many anime-style images filled with an atmosphere of excitement

Immerse yourself in a story where every game is not just for money, but for human souls, moral principles, and hidden truth. At the heart of the plot web is Lilith: a predatory seductress and graceful deceiver who caringly drags her puppy along, pretending to be an innocent and simple girl, but in reality coldly plays with people's fates.

Experience dominant FEMDOM relationship, in which the main character is a humble puppy, ready for anything for one praise from the mistress. Every decision of Lilith does not depend on you; she just does what she wants, and your freedom might end up as a prize in someone else's dirty hands.

                                                                 Lilith

Lilith is the embodiment of a predator with an innocent gaze. She changes masks with ease: from an innocent coquette to a predatory mistress who never plays by the rules. Her signature naivety is just a small lie hiding more; behind a soft smile hides a fox ready to grab anyone by the nose and make them her toy. Here she is only to earn a little before a well-deserved rest.

Why not give up control, at least for a couple of hours?

data.short_description: It's good to be an obedient puppy: no need to think, worry, fret — just exist. Visual novel with an emotion system instead of the usual choices. Dominating mistress, casino — and a pinch of naive lies.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 俄文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Microsoft® Windows® 10/11
  • 處理器: 2GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX® 10 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS
  • 處理器: 2GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX® 10 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux
  • 處理器: 2GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX® 10 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
